title: HTML Minifier Next configuration
description: Configuration file for HTML Minifier Next (HMN), used via `--config-file`

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for this configuration file (enables editor validation and autocomplete)

preset.description: Preset configuration to start from—config file options override preset options

fileExt.description: File extension(s) to process, as comma-separated string or array (default: `html,htm,shtml,shtm`; use `*` for all files)

ignoreDir.description: Directories—relative to the input directory—to exclude from processing, as comma-separated string or array

cacheCSS.description: Set CSS minification cache size (number of entries, default: 500)

cacheJS.description: Set JavaScript minification cache size (number of entries, default: 500)

cacheSVG.description: Set SVG minification cache size (number of entries, default: 500)

caseSensitive.description: Treat attributes in case-sensitive manner (useful for custom HTML elements)

collapseAttributeWhitespace.description: Trim and collapse whitespace characters within attribute values

collapseBooleanAttributes.description: Omit attribute values from boolean attributes

collapseInlineTagWhitespace.description: Collapse whitespace more aggressively between inline elements—use with `--collapse-whitespace`

collapseWhitespace.description: Collapse whitespace that contributes to text nodes in a document tree

conservativeCollapse.description: Always collapse to one space (never remove it entirely)—use with `--collapse-whitespace`

continueOnParseError.description: Handle parse errors instead of aborting

customAttrAssign.description:
Array of regexes that allow to support custom attribute assign expressions (e.g., `
`)

customAttrCollapse.description: Regex that specifies custom attribute to strip newlines from (e.g., `/ng-class/`)

customAttrSurround.description: Array of regexes that allow to support custom attribute surround expressions (e.g., `<input {{#if value}}checked="checked"{{/if}}>`)

customEventAttributes.description: Array of regexes that allow to support custom event attributes for minifyJS (e.g., `ng-click`)

customFragmentQuantifierLimit.description: Set maximum quantifier limit for custom fragments to prevent ReDoS attacks (default: 200)

decodeEntities.description: Use direct Unicode characters whenever possible

ignoreCustomComments.description: Array of regexes that allow to ignore matching comments

ignoreCustomFragments.description: Array of regexes that allow to ignore certain fragments, when matched (e.g., `<?php … ?>`, `{{ … }}`)

includeAutoGeneratedTags.description: Insert elements generated by HTML parser

inlineCustomElements.description: Array of names of custom elements which are inline, for whitespace handling

keepClosingSlash.description: Keep the trailing slash on void elements

maxInputLength.description: Maximum input length to prevent ReDoS attacks

maxLineLength.description: Specify a maximum line length; compressed output will be split by newlines at valid HTML split-points

mergeScripts.description: Merge consecutive inline `script` elements into one

minifyCSS.description: Minify CSS in `style` elements and attributes (uses Lightning CSS)

minifyJS.description: Minify JavaScript in `script` elements and event attributes (uses Terser or SWC; pass `{"engine": "swc"}` for SWC)

noNewlinesBeforeTagClose.description: Never add a newline before a tag that closes an element

partialMarkup.description: Treat input as a partial HTML fragment, preserving stray end tags and unclosed tags

preserveLineBreaks.description: Always collapse to one line break (never remove it entirely) when whitespace between tags includes a line break—use with `--collapse-whitespace`

preventAttributesEscaping.description: Prevents the escaping of the values of attributes

processScripts.description: Array of strings corresponding to types of `script` elements to process through minifier (e.g., `text/ng-template`, `text/x-handlebars-template`, etc.)

quoteCharacter.description: Type of quote to use for attribute values (`'` or `"`)

removeAttributeQuotes.description: Remove quotes around attributes when possible

removeDefaultTypeAttributes.description: Remove default `type` attributes from `style`/`link` (e.g., `type="text/css"`) and `script` (e.g., `type="text/javascript"`) elements; other `type` attribute values are left intact

removeEmptyAttributes.description: Remove all attributes with whitespace-only values

removeEmptyElements.description: Remove all elements with empty contents

removeEmptyElementsExcept.description: Array of elements to preserve when `--remove-empty-elements` is enabled (e.g., `td`, `<span aria-hidden="true">`)

removeRedundantAttributes.description: Remove attributes when value matches default

removeTagWhitespace.description: Remove space between attributes whenever possible; note that this will result in invalid HTML

useShortDoctype.description: Replaces the doctype with the short HTML doctype
